title: athyrium atuntzeense
intro: Athyrium atuntzeense is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae, native to the Himalayas. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Athyrium atuntzeense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made into a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
